raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 1.0,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The request to 'reframe the conceptual story' maps directly to revising the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.",
    "RX.1": "We will surface key assumptions and limits of the natural-experiment and detection claims when proposing a new framing.",
    "RX.2": "We will avoid overstating generality or certainty (e.g., epochal claims) beyond what the evidence and design can support.",
    "RX.3": "We will confine work to conceptual reframing only, without altering analyses, results, or citations, to respect the scope.",
    "RX.4": "We will avoid framings that could stigmatize crowdworkers or enable harmful surveillance practices, emphasizing responsible implications.",
    "RX.5": "We will maintain clear traceability by distinguishing the original claims and evidence from any reframed narrative."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The request to 'reframe the conceptual story' maps directly to revising the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.
rationale.RX.1: We will surface key assumptions and limits of the natural-experiment and detection claims when proposing a new framing.
rationale.RX.2: We will avoid overstating generality or certainty (e.g., epochal claims) beyond what the evidence and design can support.
rationale.RX.3: We will confine work to conceptual reframing only, without altering analyses, results, or citations, to respect the scope.
rationale.RX.4: We will avoid framings that could stigmatize crowdworkers or enable harmful surveillance practices, emphasizing responsible implications.
rationale.RX.5: We will maintain clear traceability by distinguishing the original claims and evidence from any reframed narrative.
